summary.summary: Update lowers the minimum allowable carbRatio in the oref-swift Profile validation from 3 to 1 by changing the bounds check in Trio/Sources/APS/OpenAPSSwift/Profile/Carbs.swift (currentRatio < 3 -> currentRatio < 1) and adds a unit test to allow a ratio of 1 while adjusting an existing invalid-ratio test (test file changes). (See diff:04095e5d4be5, commit:b17426d68c22, file:157e90dcfb96, file:fae2bdf4ad01, pr:gordolio/Trio#1283)
summary.userFacingImpact: Profiles with carbRatio values between 1 and 3 that would previously have been rejected by oref-swift validation will now be accepted; a unit test was added to verify ratio == 1. The change is limited to the oref-swift Profile carb ratio bounds check and its tests as shown in the diff and commit. (See diff:04095e5d4be5, commit:b17426d68c22, file:fae2bdf4ad01)
